name: nber-cli
description: Use NBER-CLI to search, inspect, download, and serve NBER working paper workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Search and download NBER working papers.
interface.longDescription: NBER-CLI provides agent-friendly workflows for searching NBER working papers, inspecting metadata, downloading PDFs, and running the MCP server.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use NBER-CLI to search or download NBER working papers.
